channel.title: Php on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Php on Arrans github.io

item.title: monicahq/monica
item.description: Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

item.title: wallabag/wallabag
item.description: wallabag is a self hostable application for saving web pages: Save and classify articles. Read them later. Freely.

item.title: BookStackApp/BookStack
item.description: A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: givanz/Vvveb
item.description: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

item.title: Leantime/leantime
item.description: Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

item.title: brufdev/many-notes
item.description: Markdown note-taking web application designed for simplicity

item.title: passbolt/passbolt_api
item.description: Passbolt Community Edition (CE) API. The JSON API for the open source password manager for teams!

item.title: LycheeOrg/Lychee
item.description: A great looking and easy-to-use photo-management-system you can run on your server, to manage and share photos.

item.title: Volmarg/personal-management-system
item.description: Your web application for managing personal data. personal.management.system.inbox@gmail.com

item.title: fossar/selfoss
item.description: multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application
